mapper.select: SELECT d.driver_id, d.name, d.gender, d.age, d.phone, d.line_id, l.line_name, f.fleet_name, d.is_road_captain, d.is_captain, d.hire_date FROM driver d LEFT JOIN line l ON d.line_id = l.line_id LEFT JOIN fleet f ON (l.fleet_id = f.fleet_id OR f.captain_id = d.driver_id)

SELECT d.driver_id, d.name, d.gender, d.age, d.phone, d.line_id, l.line_name, f.fleet_name, d.is_road_captain, d.is_captain, d.hire_date FROM driver d LEFT JOIN line l ON d.line_id = l.line_id LEFT JOIN fleet f ON (l.fleet_id = f.fleet_id OR f.captain_id = d.driver_id) WHERE d.driver_id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO driver (name, gender, age, phone, line_id, is_road_captain, is_captain, hire_date) VALUES (#{name}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{phone}, #{lineId}, #{isRoadCaptain}, #{isCaptain}, #{hireDate})
mapper.select: SELECT d.driver_id, d.name, d.gender, d.age, d.phone, d.line_id, l.line_name, f.fleet_name, d.is_road_captain, d.is_captain, d.hire_date FROM driver d LEFT JOIN line l ON d.line_id = l.line_id LEFT JOIN fleet f ON (l.fleet_id = f.fleet_id OR f.captain_id = d.driver_id)

SELECT d.driver_id, d.name, d.gender, d.age, d.phone, d.line_id, l.line_name, f.fleet_name, d.is_road_captain, d.is_captain, d.hire_date FROM driver d LEFT JOIN line l ON d.line_id = l.line_id LEFT JOIN fleet f ON (l.fleet_id = f.fleet_id OR f.captain_id = d.driver_id) WHERE d.line_id = #{lineId}

SELECT d.driver_id, d.name, d.gender, d.age, d.phone, d.line_id, l.line_name, f.fleet_name, d.is_road_captain, d.is_captain, d.hire_date FROM driver d LEFT JOIN line l ON d.line_id = l.line_id LEFT JOIN fleet f ON l.fleet_id = f.fleet_id WHERE l.fleet_id = #{fleetId} OR d.driver_id IN (SELECT captain_id FROM fleet WHERE fleet_id = #{fleetId})
